form.formComment: Returns from a 41-day let-up. At the latest run scored a big 4 len win at Cavaillon March 1 over 2200m on a rain affected track defeating Amazing Control with 56.5kg. The race before that 11th of 13 at Cagnes-sur-Mer All Weather on February 22 over 2000m, 13 len behind J'aurais Du with 64kg at $9.30. Hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Last start made ground from midfield; 2nd of 15 at Strasbourg on March 22 over 2350m, on a slow track; head behind Algeciras with 60kg at $5.70. The race before that raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 12 at Lyon-la-Soie on February 24 over 2150m, 8 len behind Sogynt carrying 55kg at $5.90. Not far away of late. Can play a role in the outcome.

form.formComment: Most recently sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 7 at Compiegne on March 27 over 2400m, on a slow track; 1.5 len behind Queenfleur with 57.5kg at $9.70. form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 10 months 2nd in a small field at Nantes on March 31 over 3100m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Never Come Back with 59kg at $4.50. form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 37-day let-up. Most recently 2nd of 13 at Saint-Cloud on March 5 over 2000m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Narcos with 54.5kg at $7.90.
